text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Sheesh, Flo! I got the chills out there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, um... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hmm? You okay? Need a thump on the back?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... It's okay! I'm fine now!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But girl, you beat me to the goddess's kiss, huh?
Good for you, BB Flo!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, maybe I'll give you a peck too! We've gotta
celebrate somehow! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Smoooooch! ☆

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Helios. There is a breeze blowing from Nature's
direction that seems willing to play along with
yours.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For real? Sweet! Yo, Nature! Let's snap some pics
for the gram!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (What just happened?)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: To be honest, losing to you here...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...Feels exactly as though the wind has left me. It's
extremely vexing...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I wish to go beyond this, so it was impermissible
of me to lose to you today.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...It seems we'll be facing each other next at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Again, congratulations. But next time, I'll be back
with the strength of a hurricane.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm a Mile Champion now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks!
choice_data_list:
Let's celebrate by having all your favorites
tonight!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That sounds great! I can't wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What do you want to eat? Choose whatever you'd
like!
choice_data_list: No, no. You should be the one to choose!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Okay, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm? I can't think of anything.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I guess when it comes down to it, I prefer
cooking, so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and make any food requests you have,
Trainer! ♪
